title: Cute Coffee Mug, Novelty Ceramic Coffee Mug with Feet, Hand Kneaded Cute Expression Tea Cup, Aesthetic Tableware Decoration, Also Used for Flower Pot, Pen Holder(Brown)
features: Cloud Feet Design: Enjoy the joy of sipping from a cloud-shaped coffee mug with adorable feet design, bringing a delightful touch to your coffee break
Safe Sipping Handle: With a comfortable grip, this cloud coffee mug keeps your fingers safely away from hot surfaces, ensuring a pleasant sipping experience
Ceramic Material: Crafted from ceramic, this smooth, sturdy structure ensures any scratches or fading, microwave and dishwasher safe for convenience
Festive Gift: Upgrade celebrations on Christmas, Thanksgiving, or Halloween with this cloud coffee mug: a perfect gift for friends or family, adding joy and coziness to every occasion
Widely used: Designed to preserve the freshness of your favorite beverages, whether it's hot coffee, refreshing tea, cold milk, or fruity juice, catering to your beverage preferences
description: Product Description Distinctive Ceramic Craftsmanship Designed with intricate textural patterns, this mug reflects artisanal craftsmanship, ensuring each piece feels individual in hand and enhances the ritual of drinking coffee or tea during quiet moments or shared gatherings Broad Application Value With its versatile nature, the cute coffee mug caters to different environments like homes, offices, and coffee shops, combining utility with an expressive touch that enhances beverage enjoyment while aligning perfectly with personal tastes and shared experiences The Cute Funny Mug for Women is an adorable addition to any home kitchen drinkware collection, designed to bring joy with every sip. This versatile drinking beverage container suits a variety of drinks, including wine, latte, milk, hot cocoa, and both cold and hot beverages. Perfect for women, men, families, office coworkers, and friends, it adds charm to everyday moments. Whether used at breakfast, during work breaks, or while relaxing at home, this mug enhances the experience of enjoying your favorite drinks. Its delightful design makes it a perfect present for loved people or colleagues who appreciate cute and functional drinkware. Share laughter and warmth by incorporating this charming mug into daily routines, creating memorable experiences around beverages shared with others. Specification: Name: mug Color: caramel, orange, blue Capacity: 300-400ml Product size: about 9.7x7.3x3.5cm/3.82x2.87x1.38 inches Material: ceramic Packing List: 1* Cute Mug Note: Due to different lighting and screen settings, the item color may be slightly different from the picture. Due to different manual measurements, please allow a 1-2cm difference in size.
